Properties.Description: Wine Roam — Anthropic Workspace API key (set value after deploy)
Wine Roam — Anthropic Admin API key for org cost reporting
Wine Roam — Web Push VAPID {publicKey, privateKey, subject} (set value after deploy)
Wine Roam — Resend {apiKey, fromEmail}. Shareable now; swap value to switch accounts.
Wine Roam — Twilio {accountSid, authToken, fromNumber}. Swap value to switch accounts.

Properties.EmailVerificationMessage: The verification code to your new account is {####}
Properties.SmsVerificationMessage: The verification code to your new account is {####}

VerificationMessageTemplate.EmailMessage: The verification code to your new account is {####}
VerificationMessageTemplate.SmsMessage: The verification code to your new account is {####}

Properties.Description: Wine Roam — Google OAuth client secret: set { "clientSecret": "..." }
Wine Roam — Apple Sign in private key (.p8): set { "privateKey": "..." }

Properties.Definition:
# AppSync schema for Wine Roam. Auth directives applied via CDK defaults.

type Winery {
  id: ID!
  name: String!
  region: String!
  appellation: String
  country: String
  winemaker: String
  grapes: [String!]
  notes: String
  website: String
}

type SourceLink @aws_api_key @aws_cognito_user_pools {
  label: String!
  url: String!
}

type Bottle @aws_api_key @aws_cognito_user_pools {
  id: ID!
  producer: String!
  name: String!
  wineryId: String!
  wineType: String!
  vintage: Int
  abv: Float!
  region: String!
  appellation: String
  country: String
  grapes: [String!]
  aging: String
  vinification: String
  soil: String
  climate: String
  aromas: [String!]!
  flavors: [String!]!
  tastingNotes: String
  story: String
  accent: String!
  verified: Boolean
  organic: Boolean
  biodynamic: Boolean
  naturalWine: Boolean
  imageKeys: [String!]
  sources: [SourceLink!]
  createdAt: String
  updatedAt: String
}

type Flight @aws_api_key @aws_cognito_user_pools {
  id: ID!
  title: String!
  subtitle: String!
  bottleIds: [String!]!
  curated: Boolean!
}

type TastingSession {
  sessionId: ID!
  tastingId: String!
  hostId: String!
  joinCode: String!
  status: String!
  pacing: String!
  visibility: String!
  currentStep: Int!
  createdAt: String!
}

type Participant {
  sessionId: ID!
  participantId: ID!
  displayName: String!
  accountId: String
  joinedAt: String!
}

type Rating {
  sessionId: ID!
  participantId: ID!
  bottleId: ID!
  appearance: Int
  nose: Int
  palate: Int
  finish: Int
  overall: Int
  note: String
  syncedAt: String!
}

type Review @aws_api_key @aws_cognito_user_pools {
  bottleId: ID!
  userId: ID!
  displayName: String!
  body: String!
  score: Int
  nose: Int
  palate: Int
  finish: Int
  published: Boolean!
  moderation: String
  createdAt: String!
}

type LeaderboardEntry {
  participantId: ID!
  displayName: String!
  correct: Int!
  total: Int!
  avgMs: Float!
}

input RatingInput {
  sessionId: ID!
  participantId: ID!
  bottleId: ID!
  appearance: Int
  nose: Int
  palate: Int
  finish: Int
  overall: Int
  note: String
}

input ReviewInput {
  bottleId: ID!
  body: String!
  score: Int
  nose: Int
  palate: Int
  finish: Int
  published: Boolean!
}

type UploadTarget @aws_api_key @aws_cognito_user_pools {
  uploadUrl: String!
  key: String!
  publicUrl: String!
}

type UserProfile @aws_cognito_user_pools {
  displayName: String!
  phone: String!
  notify: Boolean!
  favorite: String!
}
input ProfileInput {
  displayName: String
  phone: String
  notify: Boolean
  favorite: String
}
input FlightInput {
  id: String!
  title: String!
  subtitle: String!
  bottleIds: [String!]!
}
input BottlePatch {
  verified: Boolean
  wineryId: String
  abv: Float
  wineType: String
  organic: Boolean
}

type ShelfItem @aws_cognito_user_pools {
  bottleId: ID!
  status: String!
  addedAt: String!
}

type Reminder @aws_cognito_user_pools {
  id: ID!
  title: String!
  message: String!
  when: String!
  channel: String!
  email: String
  phone: String
}
input ReminderInput {
  id: String!
  title: String!
  message: String!
  when: String!
  channel: String!
  email: String
  phone: String
}

type TastingEntry @aws_cognito_user_pools {
  id: ID!
  flightId: String!
  title: String!
  bottleCount: Int!
  avgScore: Float!
  quizCorrect: Int
  quizTotal: Int
  mode: String!
  createdAt: String!
}
input TastingEntryInput {
  id: String!
  flightId: String!
  title: String!
  bottleCount: Int!
  avgScore: Float!
  quizCorrect: Int
  quizTotal: Int
  mode: String!
  createdAt: String!
}

type PopBottle @aws_api_key @aws_cognito_user_pools {
  bottleId: ID!
  count: Int!
}

type Query {
  listBottles: [Bottle!]!
  bottlePopularity: [PopBottle!]!
  getBottle(id: ID!): Bottle
  getScanResult(imageKey: String!): Bottle
  listFlights: [Flight!]!
  getSession(sessionId: ID!): TastingSession
  listParticipants(sessionId: ID!): [Participant!]!
  listRatings(sessionId: ID!, bottleId: ID!): [Rating!]!
  listReviews(bottleId: ID!): [Review!]!
  leaderboard(sessionId: ID!): [LeaderboardEntry!]!
  listPendingReviews: [Review!]! @aws_cognito_user_pools
  adminListUsers(search: String, nextToken: String): AdminUserPage! @aws_cognito_user_pools
  adminGetUser(username: ID!): AdminUserDetail! @aws_cognito_user_pools
  adminAuditLog(limit: Int): [AuditEntry!]! @aws_cognito_user_pools
  adminCosts(refresh: Boolean): AdminCosts! @aws_cognito_user_pools
  getMyProfile: UserProfile! @aws_cognito_user_pools
  listMyFlights: [Flight!]! @aws_cognito_user_pools
  listMyHistory: [TastingEntry!]! @aws_cognito_user_pools
  listMyFavorites: [String!]! @aws_cognito_user_pools
  listMyShelf: [ShelfItem!]! @aws_cognito_user_pools
  listMyReminders: [Reminder!]! @aws_cognito_user_pools
  adminAnalytics(days: Int): [AnalyticsDay!]! @aws_cognito_user_pools
  adminAlarms: [AlarmRow!]! @aws_cognito_user_pools
  adminAiUsage(days: Int): [AiFeatureCost!]! @aws_cognito_user_pools
  adminListFeedback(limit: Int): [Feedback!]! @aws_cognito_user_pools
  adminPageViews: [PageView!]! @aws_cognito_user_pools
}

type PageView @aws_cognito_user_pools {
  page: String!
  count: Int!
}

type Feedback @aws_cognito_user_pools {
  id: ID!
  at: String!
  category: String!
  message: String!
  email: String
  path: String
}

type AiFeatureCost @aws_cognito_user_pools {
  feature: String!
  model: String!
  inputTokens: Float!
  outputTokens: Float!
  cacheReadTokens: Float!
  cacheWriteTokens: Float!
  calls: Int!
  cost: Float!
}

type AlarmRow @aws_cognito_user_pools {
  name: String!
  state: String!
  reason: String!
  metric: String!
  updated: String!
}

type ModerationResult @aws_api_key @aws_cognito_user_pools {
  verdict: String!
  reason: String!
}

type AdminUser @aws_cognito_user_pools {
  username: ID!
  email: String!
  status: String!
  enabled: Boolean!
  createdAt: String!
  lastModified: String
  emailVerified: Boolean
  isAdmin: Boolean
}

type AdminUserPage @aws_cognito_user_pools {
  users: [AdminUser!]!
  nextToken: String
}

type AdminUserDetail @aws_cognito_user_pools {
  username: ID!
  email: String!
  status: String!
  enabled: Boolean!
  createdAt: String!
  lastModified: String
  emailVerified: Boolean
  mfaEnabled: Boolean!
  preferredMfa: String
  lastLogin: String
  loginCount: Int
  isAdmin: Boolean!
}

type AuditEntry @aws_cognito_user_pools {
  at: String!
  actor: String!
  action: String!
  target: String!
  detail: String!
}

type CostLine @aws_cognito_user_pools {
  name: String!
  amount: Float!
}

type ModelCost @aws_cognito_user_pools {
  model: String!
  inputTokens: Float!
  outputTokens: Float!
  cacheReadTokens: Float!
  cacheWriteTokens: Float!
  cost: Float!
}

type AdminCosts @aws_cognito_user_pools {
  awsMonth: Float!
  anthropicMonth: Float!
  anthropicEstimate: Float!
  budget: Float!
  asOf: String!
  cached: Boolean!
  awsByService: [CostLine!]!
  awsDaily: [CostLine!]!
  anthropicByModel: [ModelCost!]!
}

type AnalyticsDay @aws_cognito_user_pools {
  day: String!
  pageView: Int!
  tastingStarted: Int!
  scan: Int!
  quizAnswer: Int!
  reviewPublished: Int!
  liveHosted: Int!
}

type Mutation {
  startSession(tastingId: ID!, pacing: String!, visibility: String!): TastingSession!
  advanceSession(sessionId: ID!, step: Int!, status: String): TastingSession!
  joinSession(joinCode: String!, displayName: String!): Participant!
  submitRating(input: RatingInput!): Rating!
  answerQuiz(sessionId: ID!, participantId: ID!, questionId: ID!, choiceIndex: Int!, correct: Boolean!, ms: Int!): Boolean!
  track(name: String!, path: String): Boolean!
  submitFeedback(category: String!, message: String!, email: String, path: String): Boolean!
  upsertReview(input: ReviewInput!): Review! @aws_cognito_user_pools
  recognizeBottle(imageKey: String!): Bottle @aws_cognito_user_pools
  askChat(message: String!, history: String): String!
  sendInvite(joinCode: String!, email: String, phone: String): Boolean! @aws_cognito_user_pools
  sendRecap(email: String, phone: String, subject: String, html: String, text: String): Boolean! @aws_cognito_user_pools
  presignUpload(bottleId: ID!, contentType: String!): UploadTarget! @aws_cognito_user_pools
  setBottleImage(bottleId: ID!, imageUrl: String!): Bottle! @aws_cognito_user_pools
  moderateReview(bottleId: ID!, userId: ID!): ModerationResult! @aws_cognito_user_pools
  setReviewModeration(bottleId: ID!, userId: ID!, decision: String!): Review! @aws_cognito_user_pools
  adminUserAction(username: String!, action: String!, value: String): Boolean! @aws_cognito_user_pools
  saveMyProfile(input: ProfileInput!): UserProfile! @aws_cognito_user_pools
  saveMyFlight(input: FlightInput!): Flight! @aws_cognito_user_pools
  deleteMyFlight(id: String!): Boolean! @aws_cognito_user_pools
  adminPatchBottle(id: ID!, patch: BottlePatch!): Bottle! @aws_cognito_user_pools
  adminDeleteBottle(id: ID!): Boolean! @aws_cognito_user_pools
  saveMyTasting(input: TastingEntryInput!): TastingEntry! @aws_cognito_user_pools
  deleteMyTasting(id: String!): Boolean! @aws_cognito_user_pools
  setFavorite(bottleId: String!, favorited: Boolean!): Boolean! @aws_cognito_user_pools
  setShelf(bottleId: ID!, status: String): Boolean! @aws_cognito_user_pools
  savePushSub(subscription: String!): Boolean! @aws_cognito_user_pools
  removePushSub(endpoint: String!): Boolean! @aws_cognito_user_pools
  adminTestPush: Boolean! @aws_cognito_user_pools
  saveMyReminder(input: ReminderInput!): Reminder! @aws_cognito_user_pools
  deleteMyReminder(id: String!): Boolean! @aws_cognito_user_pools
}

type Subscription {
  onSessionAdvanced(sessionId: ID!): TastingSession
    @aws_subscribe(mutations: ["advanceSession"])
  onParticipantJoined(sessionId: ID!): Participant
    @aws_subscribe(mutations: ["joinSession"])
  onRatingSubmitted(sessionId: ID!): Rating
    @aws_subscribe(mutations: ["submitRating"])
}

BootstrapVersion.Description: Version of the CDK Bootstrap resources in this environment, automatically retrieved from SSM Parameter Store. [cdk:skip]

Assertions.AssertDescription: CDK bootstrap stack version 6 required. Please run 'cdk bootstrap' with a recent version of the CDK CLI.
